agent_raw: The 16% improvement in recovered balance per account cannot be treated as strong evidence that the collections model caused better recoveries. The before-after comparison confounds three distinct changes: tax-refund season (which independently improves recovery), a new dialer vendor (which changed which accounts were reachable), and managerial queue overrides (which partially bypassed model ranking). Without a same-period control group showing what would have happened under the old system during the same favorable conditions, the causal contribution of the model is unidentifiable. The board memo should acknowledge that the combined system shows promising results and commission a champion-challenger test before attributing the gain to the model specifically.

empirical_test.condition: Champion-challenger randomized queue test in the same calendar period
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Model-ranked accounts show no material recovery difference from legacy-ranked accounts under controlled dialer and override conditions
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Model-ranked accounts deliver materially higher recoveries than legacy-ranked accounts in a controlled concurrent test
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Some gain persists but concentrated in newly-reachable or refund-season accounts
